title: Amtech S2905 Eye Loupe Set, Jewellers Loupe Magnifier for Watches, Coins and Stamps 3-Piece set includes x2, x5, and x10 lenses
features: Ideal Product: The Amtech Eye Loupe Magnifiers are ideal for the close inspection of jewellery. However, they can also be used extensively across mechanical and electronic tasks, such as repairing watches or replacing batteries.
Set Includes: The set comprises of 3 loupe magnifiers to help you get closer to the detail, x2, x5, and x10.
Lightweight: This Jewellers loupe set is lightweight in construction and therefore comfortable to use across a range of close inspection tasks.
Placement: Select the most appropriate magnifier and simply place the eye loupes, directly on top of your subject to probe or review.
description: From the manufacturer About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
